selected_dialects.reason: The part is a rotationally symmetric coupling hub with two coaxial hubs (input hub O40x20 with O15 bore, output hub O35x18 with O12 bore). The axisymmetric dialect supports revolve_profile, cut_center_bore, and cut_annular_groove which can express the stepped outer diameters and through bores.

The part has two distinct hub sections (input and output) that may need to be composed into a single body via boolean_union, or the two bores may need boolean_cut operations. Composition dialect handles combining independent components.
